• Interactive Magic 8 Ball generating AI-powered answers to user-submitted questions.
  • Supports selectable response styles: friendly, mean, silly, dramatic, and roast.
  • Includes 3D WebGL particle effects and shake animations for visual feedback.
    await puter.ai.chat(systemPrompt)
    magicBall.classList.add('is-shaking')

This web application simulates a classic Magic 8 Ball with AI-generated answers to user questions. It offers multiple selectable response styles and triggers animated visual effects during use. The app features 3D WebGL particle displays and shake animations to enhance interactivity.
